channel.title: The Six-Month Signal
channel.description: A daily analyst brief answering one question: what will frontier AI models and systems look like in the next six months? Model releases and capability deltas, evals and benchmark anomalies, agent reliability, and inference economics - in about ten minutes, every weekday.
channel.itunes:author: Isaac Luo

item.title: Governed Autonomy Is Becoming the Frontier AI Stack
item.description: Today’s episode covers Anthropic’s Sonnet 5, Claude Science, and Fable/Mythos access shift; Google, GitHub, and Cursor’s move toward governed agent runtimes; operator patterns from Every and Latent Space; and the inference-economics layer highlighted by SemiAnalysis, Sequoia Training Data, Air Street Press, and Braintrust. The through-line is that the next six months of AI systems may be defined less by standalone chatbot scores and more by cost-controlled, permissioned, eval-driven workflow loops.
